assumptions.statement: JWT tokens are validated on every API request
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: Unauthenticated API access possible if validation is inconsistent or missing on some endpoints
assumptions.validation_method: Review API middleware configuration and test auth bypass scenarios

assumptions.statement: Stripe handles all raw card data (platform is not in PCI scope)
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: PCI-DSS compliance scope would expand dramatically requiring significant security controls
assumptions.validation_method: Verify stripe_payment_method_id is used, no raw card numbers stored

assumptions.statement: HTTPS is enforced for all API communications
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: Credentials, payment data, and PII could be exposed in transit
assumptions.validation_method: Test for HTTP endpoints, verify TLS configuration

assumptions.statement: Password hashing uses a modern algorithm (bcrypt/argon2)
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: Credential compromise significantly easier if using weak hashing (MD5/SHA1)
assumptions.validation_method: Review User Service password storage implementation

assumptions.statement: Rate limiting exists on authentication endpoints
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: Brute force attacks on login, password reset, and OTP verification feasible
assumptions.validation_method: Test rate limiting on auth endpoints

assumptions.statement: Driver document uploads are validated for file type and content
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: Malicious file uploads could lead to RCE or stored XSS
assumptions.validation_method: Review S3 upload handling and file validation logic

assumptions.statement: Role-based access control is enforced at the API level
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: Privilege escalation attacks possible (customer accessing driver/admin functions)
assumptions.validation_method: Test IDOR and BOLA vulnerabilities across role boundaries

assumptions.statement: WebSocket connections require valid authentication tokens
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: Unauthorized access to real-time location data and order tracking
assumptions.validation_method: Test WebSocket connection without auth token
